title: stelis chihobensis
intro: Stelis chihobensis, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stelis chihobensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Stelis chihobensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its safety and efficacy as a medicinal plant.
